title: TBW - This Beautiful World
description: A modpack focussing on large-scale exploration of beautiful worlds.
body:
This modpack aims to create a familiar experience in a new environment. The world generation for every dimension has been altered, to help bring back a feeling of adventure and wonder. Apart from that, there are some light magic and technology aspects.

# Notable features

- Lots of optimization mods
- Included shaderpack
- Pressing "CTRL + T" while hovering an item will share it in chat
- Realistic sound physics
